acquisition method: operating in data-dependent mode with a Nanospray Flex™ (ESI) ion source.
cleavage agent: subjected to trypsin digestion at 37 °C for 4 h
collision energy: the normalized collision energy was set to 27%.
fragmentation method: fragmented via higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD).
instrument: analyzed using a Q ExactiveTM HF-X mass spectrometer.
